data.title: 210 test files missing from .test-index — systemic registration gap
data.description: Anti-pattern scan during fix of 9973-f309 found ~210 test files across tests/skills/, tests/agents/, tests/scripts/, tests/hooks/, and tests/plugin/ that are not registered in .test-index. This means changes to their corresponding source files will not trigger these tests via the test gate. Likely caused by incremental additions without updating .test-index.
